title: Return my XP farm
description: Always drop experience from zombified piglins if they were angry at player
body:
## Return my gold farm

Always drop experience and player-specific loot from zombified piglins if they were angry at player.

![Example of loot before and after this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3f6c061b3f932809d07da98dcef29beffbc35f7.png)

[Discord](https://discord.gg/UY4nhvUzaK)
